---
title: "Events"
format: html
---

## 📅 Upcoming Events

<div id="upcoming-events-list" class="events-list"></div>

## 📂 Past Events

<div id="past-events-list" class="events-list"></div>

<script>
const EVENTS = [
  {
    date: "2026-05-01",
    label: "01 May 2026",
    titles: ["TRT T\u00fcrkiye'nin Sesi Radyosu Memleket Treni Program\u0131-Konuk", "\u00c7al\u0131\u015fma Ya\u015fam\u0131n\u0131n D\u00fcn\u00fc ve Bug\u00fcn\u00fc"],
    location: "",
    link: { url: "https://radyo.trt.net.tr/kanallar/tsr", text: "\ud83d\udd17 Dinlemek i\u00e7in" }
  },
  {
    date: "2026-05-08",
    label: "08 May 2026",
    titles: ["Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program- Workshop Day", "Ankara Development Agency 2026 Social Innovation and Social Development Technical Support Programme \u2013 Project Application Workshop"],
    location: "Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University",
    link: { url: "https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126", text: "\ud83d\udd17 Etkinlik Detay\u0131" }
  },
  {
    date: "2026-05-18",
    label: "18 May 2026",
    titles: ["T\u00dcB\u0130TAK Science Talks-2: Social Entrepreneurship \u2013 The Art of Changing the World"],
    location: "Yayla Mesleki ve Teknik Anadolu Lisesi, Zonguldak",
    link: null
  },
  {
    date: "2026-05-22",
    label: "22 May 2026",
    titles: ["T\u00dcB\u0130TAK Science Talks-3: Social Entrepreneurship \u2013 The Art of Changing the World"],
    location: "Gerede Hac\u0131 Sad\u0131k \u00d6ztosun Anadolu Lisesi, Bolu",
    link: null
  },
  {
    date: "2026-04-24",
    label: "24 April 2026",
    titles: ["Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 4/4"],
    location: "Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University",
    link: { url: "https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126", text: "\ud83d\udd17 Etkinlik Detay\u0131" }
  },
  {
    date: "2026-04-17",
    label: "17 April 2026",
    titles: ["Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 3/4"],
    location: "Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University",
    link: { url: "https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126", text: "\ud83d\udd17 Etkinlik Detay\u0131" }
  },
  {
    date: "2026-04-16",
    label: "16 April 2026",
    titles: ["T\u00dcB\u0130TAK Science Talks-1: Social Entrepreneurship \u2013 The Art of Changing the World"],
    location: "Ankara Lisesi, Ankara",
    link: null
  },
  {
    date: "2026-04-10",
    label: "10 April 2026",
    titles: ["Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 2/4"],
    location: "Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University",
    link: { url: "https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126", text: "\ud83d\udd17 Etkinlik Detay\u0131" }
  },
  {
    date: "2026-04-03",
    label: "03 April 2026",
    titles: ["Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program-Week 1/4"],
    location: "Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University",
    link: { url: "https://etkinlikler.hacettepe.edu.tr//tr/sosyal_girisimcilik_egiticiler-3126", text: "\ud83d\udd17 Etkinlik Detay\u0131" }
  }
];

function renderCard(event, isPast) {
  const titlesHtml = event.titles.map(t => "<h3>" + t + "</h3>").join("");
  const locationHtml = event.location ? "<p><strong>Location:</strong> " + event.location + "</p>" : "";
  const linkHtml = event.link ? '<p><a href="' + event.link.url + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' + event.link.text + "</a></p>" : "";
  const pastClass = isPast ? " past-event" : "";
  return '<div class="event-card' + pastClass + '"><div class="event-date">' + event.label + "</div>" + titlesHtml + locationHtml + linkHtml + "</div>";
}

function parseLocalDate(isoDate) {
  const parts = isoDate.split("-").map(Number);
  return new Date(parts[0], parts[1] - 1, parts[2]);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);

  const upcomingContainer = document.getElementById("upcoming-events-list");
  const pastContainer = document.getElementById("past-events-list");

  const upcoming = EVENTS.filter(function(e) { return parseLocalDate(e.date) >= today; })
    .sort(function(a, b) { return parseLocalDate(a.date) - parseLocalDate(b.date); });
  const past = EVENTS.filter(function(e) { return parseLocalDate(e.date) < today; })
    .sort(function(a, b) { return parseLocalDate(b.date) - parseLocalDate(a.date); });

  upcomingContainer.innerHTML = upcoming.length
    ? upcoming.map(function(e) { return renderCard(e, false); }).join("")
    : "<p><em>No upcoming events at the moment.</em></p>";

  pastContainer.innerHTML = past.length
    ? past.map(function(e) { return renderCard(e, true); }).join("")
    : "<p><em>No past events.</em></p>";
});
</script>
